title: D.A. Davidson Acts as Sell-Side Advisor to COMC on its Commercial Agreement and Investment from eBay Inc.
text: IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--D.A. Davidson & Co. announced today that it served as exclusive sell-side advisor to COMC, an innovator in the sports trading cards space, on its recent commercial agreement and investment from eBay Inc., a global commerce leader that connects millions of sellers and buyers around the world. In addition, the companies have entered into a commercial agreement to accelerate the growth of the trading card hobby. Founded in 2005 by Tim and Julia Getsch, COMC's c.

title: eBay Announces Commercial Agreement and Investment in Sports Trading Card Company COMC, Strengthening Commitment to Collectible Enthusiasts
text: Deal will expand COMC's technology-based listing and management model, offering collectors extensive selection and improved listing capabilities SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. (Nasdaq: EBAY), a global commerce leader that connects millions of sellers and buyers around the world, and COMC, an innovator in the sports trading cards space, today announced that the companies have entered a commercial agreement to accelerate the growth of the trading card hobby.

title: At a $122.25 price target, PDD analysts need to catch up

title: Better Buy: Etsy vs. eBay Stock
text: Both eBay and Etsy have been laggards in this year's upward-trending stock market. Etsy, specializing in handmade and vintage items, is growing its buyer pool more quickly.

title: eBay stock up on Adevinta stake sale
text: eBay Inc shares rose 3% to $41.64 in late-morning trading on Wednesday after the online marketplace announced it is selling its remaining shares in the online classified business Adevinta to private equity firms Permira and Blackstone for $2.2 billion in cash and 20% equity in the newly privatized company.   Adevinta had originally acquired eBay's own classified business back in 2020 and now intends to go private.

title: EBay agrees to sell stake in Adevinta in Blackstone, Permira buyout deal
text: Adevinta's stock NO:ADE ADEVY was in the spotlight on Wednesday after Permira and Blackstone Inc. BX on Tuesday said they are offering to buy all of the outstanding ordinary Class A shares in the Norway-based online classified advertising company for $13 billion. Adevinta stock was up 5% in Norway on Wednesday, while its American depositary shares have not yet traded.

title: Options Bulls Eye eBay Stock Amid Acquisition Buzz
text: Options bulls are targeting online marketplace giant eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) amid today's news.

title: eBay Supports Voluntary Offer to Acquire Adevinta
text: eBay would receive USD $2.2 billion cash and retain a 20% ownership stake SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. (Nasdaq: EBAY), a global commerce leader that connects millions of sellers and buyers around the world, announced its support for the voluntary tender offer led by Permira and Blackstone to acquire all the publicly traded shares of Adevinta (the "Offer").

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Long-Term Stocks to Buy: November 2023
text: The stock market's rebound is offering plenty of bargains for investors hunting for value. When the market declined for three consecutive months from August to October, investors saw stock prices and valuations pushed down.

title: ChatGPT Plus subscriptions are being listed on eBay after OpenAI blocked signups
text: OpenAI boss Sam Altman said on Wednesday that the company would pause new ChatGPT Plus signups.  Some users have responded by listing ChatGPT Plus account details on eBay.

title: 3 Stocks That Are About to Get Absolutely Crushed in Q4
text: Is the stock market's current bull run real, or are we in the midst of a bear market rally? That's the debate raging right now as equities soften after posting their longest winning streak in two years.

title: Why Are Stocks Down Today?
text: Stocks have slipped into the red today after notching their longest winning streak in two years as investor sentiment softens and several prominent companies miss third-quarter earnings estimates. While today's move lower could be a brief pause in a year-end rally, some analysts are wondering if the enthusiasm seen after the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at the start of November may now be starting to wane.

title: EBay, Losing Shoppers To Amazon, Keeps Trying To Woo Superfans
text: The site has been adding buyer-friendly features like authentication to keep its best customers around. It hasn't stopped their ranks from thinning.

title: Dow set for modest gains ahead of Powell speech; eBay slips
text: 7:00am: Subdued start expected, mixed fortunes for Rivian and Lucid US stocks are expected to make a subdued start to trading ahead of a speech by Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell later today. In pre-market trading, futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average were up 0.1%, while those for the S&P 500 were 0.1% higher, and contracts for the Nasdaq 100 futures were little changed.

title: AI Upgrades Are Creating Happy Customers, eBay Says
text: EBay is finding that its investments in artificial intelligence (AI) are leading to happier customers.    On Tuesday (Nov 7), the company revealed during its latest earnings call that its investments in AI have enhanced the way customers perceive its shipping capabilities.

title: After-Hours Selling to Challenge Winning Streak Wednesday
text: Gilead, eBay and Rivian all beat on the bottom line in Q3, but all three are selling the news.

title: eBay's holiday guidance falls short of expectations
text: Shares of eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) fell more than 5% after the company posted underwhelming guidance for the holiday quarter.  The ecommerce company guided for fourth-quarter earnings between $1 and $1.05 on revenue between $2.47 billion to $2.53 billion.

title: EBay stock slips on disappointing holiday sales forecast
text: EBay Inc.'s stock slid 4% in extended trading Tuesday after the online marketplace reported quarterly results that were in line with analysts' estimates, but declining margins and weak revenue guidance.

title: EBay Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Outlook Short Of Views
text: EBay stock was trading lower late Tuesday after the company reported adjusted earnings of $1.03 per share on $2.5 billion in Q3 sales.

title: Can Markets Keep the Winning Streak Intact?
text: Uber missed on headline although business was good, D.R. Horton beat and raised, and the U.S. trade deficit got slimmer.

title: Fintech Stocks In Focus As European Slowdown Weighs On Sector
text: Worldline reports disappointing Q3 earnings results, leading to a sharp decline in its stock and impacting other payment companies. Over the last two weeks, shares in both Worldline and Paycom corrected sharply in the wake of earnings. So far, American fintechs such as Block and PayPal have fared slightly better, but that could change if the U.S. economy falls into recession.

title: EBAY Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: EBAY's third-quarter 2023 results are likely to reflect the impacts of strong momentum across Promoted Listings amid softness in the marketplace platform.
